## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming projects.](https://fathom.video/share/ZdzmykfvyZyuz54shnUhaUuYipx9ogs4?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content pipeline: 73 topics approved; industry pages template finalized](https://fathom.video/share/ZdzmykfvyZyuz54shnUhaUuYipx9ogs4?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [SEO performance: Improved quality of traffic, higher average position in SERPs](https://fathom.video/share/ZdzmykfvyZyuz54shnUhaUuYipx9ogs4?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [LLM visibility: Substantial increases across platforms, especially Claude](https://fathom.video/share/ZdzmykfvyZyuz54shnUhaUuYipx9ogs4?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [New initiatives: Wikipedia page created, ghost website concept discussed](https://fathom.video/share/ZdzmykfvyZyuz54shnUhaUuYipx9ogs4?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Industry Pages

  - [73 topics in the pipeline for upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/ZdzmykfvyZyuz54shnUhaUuYipx9ogs4?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Industry pages template finalized; engineering team working on pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/ZdzmykfvyZyuz54shnUhaUuYipx9ogs4?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Clarification on connectors: Use first tab of master list, excluding those marked for removal](https://fathom.video/share/ZdzmykfvyZyuz54shnUhaUuYipx9ogs4?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Prioritizing industries: Healthcare, financial services, fintech, and tech-forward regulated industries](https://fathom.video/share/ZdzmykfvyZyuz54shnUhaUuYipx9ogs4?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
